title: The Sun Comes Up
writer: William Ludwig, Margaret Fitts, Marjorie Kinnan Rawlings
actors: Jeanette MacDonald, Lloyd Nolan, Claude Jarman Jr.
plot: Set in the rural south of the United States, a bereaved war widow learns to to put aside her bitterness and grief as she grows to love a young orphan boy and the dog that belonged to her late son. Punctuated with song-filled inter...
